records.ety: [OF. escalone, eschaloingne, L. caepa Ascalonia onion of Ascalon; caepa onion + Ascalonius of Ascalon, fr. Ascalo Ascalon, a town in Palestine. Cf. Shallot.]

defs: A kind of small onion (Allium Ascalonicum), native of Palestine; the eschalot, or shallot.
Any onion which does not “bottom out,” but remains with a thick stem like a leek.
